title: gateway: make qemu_x86 build avoid LoRa lora0 alias requirement
description: Why this exists: while verifying project-LICHEN-9nrr.17, west build -b qemu_x86 lichen/apps/gateway compiled the OSCORE CoAP wrapper but then failed because the gateway QEMU configuration enables LICHEN_LORA_L2/LICHEN_L2 paths that require a devicetree alias lora0, which qemu_x86 does not provide. What needs to be done: add a qemu_x86-specific gateway config/overlay choice or Kconfig guard so gateway host/QEMU builds either use a simulated/non-LoRa ingress path or disable LoRa L2, while hardware boards with a real lora0 keep the existing path. Verify the gateway build on qemu_x86 and at least one hardware LoRa board. As a code-generation/fix Bead, run two review passes before closing.
close_reason: Fixed by adding lichen/apps/gateway/boards/qemu_x86.conf to disable CONFIG_LORA, CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2, and CONFIG_LICHEN_L2 for qemu_x86 only. Verified qemu_x86 gateway builds without lora0 or L2 objects, and t_echo/nrf52840 gateway still builds with LoRa/L2 enabled and lora0 present. Two review passes completed; no follow-up Beads needed.
